title: Note: keep sitenav single line on terminal

log.context: Note: keep sitenav single line on terminal

The service restarted cleanly. Here's what was done:

**File changed:** `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py` (lines 201–203)

The existing `.sitenav` override already set `position: relative` and `flex-shrink: 0` to integrate the nav into the page's flex column. However, the mobile media query in `sitenav.css` (at ≤768px) sets `flex-wrap: wrap` on `.sitenav` and `flex: 0 0 100%` on `.sitenav-links`, which would cause the nav to go multi-line on narrower viewports.
